use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in premium dark-themed SaaS interfaces
Access or sign-up triggers requiring visual prominence
Interactive buttons with hover feedback in creative tool dashboards
Premium feature announcement buttons in modern web applications
Conversion-focused UI elements in dark mode interfaces
ai_summary: A premium dark-themed CTA button component featuring layered purple/violet gradients with glass-morphism effects. The button includes multiple nested gradient layers creating depth, inset glow shadows, and a subtle hover animation that reveals additional gradient accents. Designed for modern SaaS and creative tool interfaces requiring elegant, high-contrast interactive elements with sophisticated visual polish.
